name: Dashy Version Tag
description: The Docker image tag to use for Dashy. 'latest' is usually fine.

name: Dashy HTTP Port
description: The external HTTP port for the Dashy dashboard.

name: Dashy HTTPS Port
description: The external HTTPS port for the Dashy dashboard.

name: Data Root Directory
description: The absolute path on the host where persistent data will be stored.

name: User ID (PUID)
description: The host user ID for file permissions. '1000' is standard for the default user.

name: Timezone
description: The timezone for the container, in TZ database format.

name: Local Domain Name
description: The domain name used for local network access (e.g., 'home.arpa').

name: Host IP Address
description: The primary IP address of the host machine.
